title: Oil: Brent steadies above $105 as Trump says nearing 'final phase' of Iran negotiations
snippet: Brent crude oil steadied above $105 per barrel, reflecting a roughly 5% drop from recent highs as markets respond to Trump's characterization of Iran negotiations entering a 'final phase.' The price decline from the ~$110 level seen on May 20 suggests traders are pricing in increased probability of a diplomatic resolution. However, the $105 floor indicates persistent risk premium from the ongoing Hormuz shipping blockade, with 1,600 vessels stranded and zero transits recorded. Analysts note that even a deal would take weeks to fully restore Hormuz traffic, keeping prices elevated above pre-war ~$75 levels in the medium term.
tag_reason: 신규 — $110에서 $105로 ~5% 하락한 새로운 가격 수준. '최종 단계' 프레이밍이라는 새로운 맥락. src-1209($110) 대비 유가 변동 추적
